meta.title: Description of Thermoanaerobacter brockii subsp. lactiethylicus subsp. nov., Isolated from a Deep Subsurface French Oil Well, a Proposal To Reclassify Thermoanaerobacter finnii as Thermoanaerobacter brockii subsp. finnii comb. nov., and an Emended Description of Thermoanaerobacter brockii
